name: prototype-interaction
description: Standalone HTML interaction prototype: a throwaway interactive region (e.g. native drag-to-reorder) plus the behaviour decisions baked into it and the open questions to push back on. Interactive template — carries the AG-0011 D2 minimal-JS exception: self-contained inline JS drives the interaction, with no external resources.

slots.description: Prototype title; used in <title> and the h1.
The interactive region; the prototype markup the user manipulates (e.g. a draggable list).
Behaviour-decision bullets baked into the prototype, rendered as list items.
One list item per unresolved interaction question.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
